fact: All database queries use the mysql2 connection pool — never create raw connections
recommendation: Import db from lib/db.js for all queries

fact: Entity codes are always 3-letter uppercase abbreviations tied to consignment records
recommendation: Validate entity codes against the ENT table before using them in any business logic

fact: Google Sheets is the primary UI layer for ERP data entry — do not build duplicate web forms for the same data
recommendation: New data entry flows should use Apps Script bound to existing sheets

fact: The TERP database connection requires SSL mode — plain connections will fail silently
recommendation: Always include ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false } in connection config for DigitalOcean MySQL
